yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Security_Affairs_newsletter_Round_566_by {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Security Affairs newsletter Round 566 by Pierluigi Paganini – INTERNATIONAL EDIT"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-09"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-APT-28" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Massive_GitHub_malware_operation_spreads {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Massive GitHub malware operation spreads BoryptGrab stealer"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-09"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "GitHub" ascii wide nocase
        $kw1 = "BoryptGrab" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Critical Nginx UI flaw CVE-2026-27944 exposes server backups"; content:"CVE-2026-27944"; nocase; sid:4827623; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
